title: Token bindings sidecar (Figma-harvested CSS properties bound to design tokens)
description: Maps Figma node IDs to arrays of CSS property bindings, where each binding associates a CSS property with a design token and its grade (semantic/primitive/literal). Harvested from Figma design context via get_design_context MCP.

_schema_version.description: Sidecar schema version, injected by the harvest writer.

slug.description: Component slug this sidecar describes (registry key, join key with anatomy.json slug).

_meta.description: Metadata about the harvest: auto_generated flag, source (figma-mcp:get_design_context), harvested_at timestamp, do_not_edit flag.

byNodeId.description: Map of Figma node IDs to arrays of token binding objects.

variantDefaults.description: Default value per variant axis (from the Figma component set), for consumers resolving which scoped bindings apply when an instance carries no explicit variant value. Only axes referenced by at least one scoped binding appear.

binding.title: CSS property token binding
binding.description: Associates a CSS property on a design-system node with a design token and its token grade.

token.description: Design token name (must start with --zen- prefix).

grade.description: Token grade: semantic (tied to intent), primitive (base token), or literal (hardcoded value as fallback).

variant.description: Optional variant scope: the binding applies only when the component set's variant axis `prop` has one of `values`. Absent = applies to every variant. Root-level scoped facts are attributed to the default variant's anatomy root node id by construction (set-level facts, not per-node Figma truth).

prop.description: Variant axis name from the Figma component set.

values.description: Array of variant values that this binding applies to.
